title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Gaurs Group Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Gaurs Group Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Gaurs Group Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Gaurs Group Advisory Limited:
Gaurs Group Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group Advisory Limited!
